title: SQ Professional Metallic Aluminium Die-Cast Stockpot Set with Lids 5pc (Ruby)
features: Premium Stock Pot Non Stick : The ceramic non-stick coating of induction soup pot lets you cook with less oil or fat, helping you prepare healthier meals. Food releases easily from the surface of aluminium stockpot, which also makes cleaning quick and easy—no soaking or scrubbing needed.

Built for All Hobs : These aluminium cooking pots non stick stockpots come with an induction-friendly base, making them suitable for use on gas, electric, ceramic, halogen, and induction hobs. Whether you’re using them as a rice pot or for more complex meals, they deliver consistent results across cooking surfaces.

Safe and Easy to Handle : The riveted side handles are sturdy and reliable, making it simple to lift, carry, and pour. From preparing a hearty meal in a stock pot with lid induction to transferring dishes from hob to table, these handles support safe kitchen work.

Glass Lids with Steam Control : Each non stick pot with lid has a strong tempered glass lid with a built-in steam vent. This helps lock in moisture and flavour while gently letting steam escape—perfect when cooking with a soup pot for induction hob for broths or sauces.

Strong, Long-Lasting Design : Crafted for performance, each piece in the stockpot set spreads heat evenly and avoids hot spots. Use your non stick stock pot for consistent cooking and reliable everyday use.

Versatile : Whether simmering sauces in stew pots, preparing everyday meals using a non stick cooking pots set, or boiling ingredients in a stock pot induction hob, these versatile pieces deliver reliable results. Perfect for expanding your cookware sets.
description: Product Description About the Range Discover what it means to cook with true heart and confidence in the kitchen, with SQ Professional's Metallic Die-Cast 5pc Stockpot Set. This elegantly vibrant set, brings class and quality to your homemade dishes. Accommodating a range of culinary styles is this set’s speciality, and with its remarkable non-stick performance, the washing up becomes an effortless task, for anyone. Quality Cookware These shimmering Stockpots may be soft on the eyes, but they’re tough, inside and out. Expertly crafted from heavy duty aluminium, these metallic stockpots will stand the test of time in your kitchen, while delivering exceptional cooking results, every time. It’s high-quality aluminium body is effective in conducting heat and distributing it evenly throughout its body, therefore preventing hotspots occurring when cooking and producing professional quality results. Seramiq Coating Integrated into the stockpots’ design is a ceramic coating, which delivers exceptional non-stick performance. Make the most of this first-class feature to create healthier meals by using virtually no oils or fats during cooking, as the incredible non-stick coating produces efficiently cooked results, with an enhanced authentic flavour. Plus, you won’t believe how well this feature works in saving time and effort spent on the washing up, as the remnants wash away smoothly, with no scrubbing required. Induction Base A further feature which makes this stockpot set an essential item for any kitchen is its compatibility with a wide range of cooking outlets. Built for confident use with an array of hob types, including: gas, electric, ceramic, halogen and induction. Vented Glass Lids These robust stockpots are complete with close-fitted, tempered glass lids, which to help retain the essential nutrients, moisture and succulence in your dishes that make them so delicious. Designed for your convenience, the clarity of the glass lids enables you to keep an eye on your cooking, and the built-in steam vents - which let controlled amounts of steam escape when cooking - ensure your dishes are always cooked in optimum conditions, and help you to create perfectly cooked meals, every time. High Quality Handles Included in the stockpots’ design are safe and sturdy riveted handles - added to help you conveniently and comfortably manoeuvre the pots around the kitchen. With the help of these high polished handles, you’ll find cooking with the pots easy and simple, and a great feature for gaining added control when stirring, sautéing, boiling or simmering your favourite tasty recipes. Professionals' Choice Cook with Confidence With their practical design features producing expert culinary results and their beautiful mirror finishes, these stockpots are a must-have for any contemporary kitchen. The stunning set includes: a 20cm stockpot with a 2.3 litre capacity, a 24cm stockpot with a 3.8 litre capacity, a 28cm stockpot with a 6.0 litre capacity, a 30cm stockpot with a 7.0 litre capacity and a 32cm stockpot with a 9.5 litre capacity – all generously sized to perfectly suit an array of recipes. Added to this, the stockpot set is available in seven exquisite colour options, and it doesn’t stop there; the washing up just got a whole lot easier, as the stockpots are all dishwasher safe! With this essential cookware set you’re sure to have the perfect pot for any recipe, plus, as high-quality aluminium in its design is renowned for its durability, you can always rely on these stockpots to cook whatever you need, on a daily basis. So, there’s nothing stopping you now, get this incredible stockpot set for your kitchen today, to bring a burst of unique style and flare to your kitchen and cooking. Product Overview Suitable for all cooker types including Made of premium Die-Cast Aluminium Ceramic Non-Stick Coating Tempered Glass lid with Steam Vent 7 Colour Option Buying Options Customer Reviews — Size - Capacity 20 cm 2.3 Litre Size - Capacity 24 cm 3.8 Litre Size - Capacity 28 cm 6.0 Litre Size - Capacity 30 cm 7.0 Litre Size - Capacity 32 cm 9.5 Litre Induction Base ✓ Glass Lid w Steam Vent ✓
